--- title: "ex19. Causal Inference: Mixed Backends with GPD - Amoroso Kernel" --- > **Legacy vignette (for the website / historical notes).** > These files may not match the current exported API one-to-one. > Last verified: **2026-01-18**. > > For the up-to-date workflow, see the main package vignettes (basic, unconditional, conditional, and causal).. # Causal Inference: Mixed Backends with GPD - Amoroso Kernel {#causal-different-backends-gpd} This vignette fits two mixed-backend causal models with GPD tails and an Amoroso kernel: - Model A: Treated = SB, Control = CRP - Model B: Treated = CRP, Control = SB We shift y to keep outcomes in a stable positive range. --- ## Data Setup ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} data("causal_alt_real500_p4_k2", package = "DPmixGPD") y_raw <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$y T <- causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$T X <- as.matrix(causal_alt_real500_p4_k2$X) shift <- abs(min(y_raw)) + 0.1 y <- y_raw + shift summary_tbl <- tibble( statistic = c("N", "Mean", "SD", "Min", "Max"), value = c(length(y), mean(y), sd(y), min(y), max(y)) ) summary_tbl %>% mutate(value = signif(value, 4)) %>% kable(caption = "Shifted Outcome Summary (Amoroso)", align = "c") %>% kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = FALSE, position = "center") ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} `````{=html}
Shifted Outcome Summary (Amoroso)
statistic value
N 500.00
Mean 8.46
SD 1.76
Min 0.10
Max 13.46
````` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} x_eval <- X[1:40, , drop = FALSE] y_eval <- y[1:40] u_threshold <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(y, 0.8, names = FALSE)) ``` ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} df_causal <- data.frame(y = y, T = as.factor(T), x1 = X[, 1]) p_scatter <- ggplot(df_causal, aes(x = x1, y = y, color = T)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.5) + labs(title = "Shifted Outcome vs X1", x = "X1", y = "y (shifted)", color = "Treatment") + theme_minimal() p_scatter ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex19-causal-different-backends-SB_files/figure-html/data-scatter-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: --- ## Model A: Treated SB, Control CRP (Amoroso + GPD) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} param_specs_gpd <- list( gpd = list( threshold = list( mode = "dist", dist = "lognormal", # Use max() to guard against log(0) = -Inf by enforcing a positive lower bound. args = list(meanlog = log(max(u_threshold, .Machine$double.eps)), sdlog = 0.25) ) ) ) bundle_sb_crp <- build_causal_bundle( y = y, T = T, X = X, kernel = c("amoroso", "amoroso"), backend = c("sb", "crp"), PS = "logit", GPD = c(TRUE, TRUE), components = c(5, 5), param_specs = param_specs_gpd, mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1), mcmc_ps = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 1) ) bundle_sb_crp ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` DPmixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Chinese Restaurant Process
Kernel amoroso amoroso
Components 5 5
GPD tail TRUE TRUE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ```{.r .cell-code} summary(bundle_sb_crp) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` DPmixGPD causal bundle summary DPmixGPD causal bundle PS model: Bayesian logit (T | X)
Field Treated Control
Backend Stick-Breaking Process Chinese Restaurant Process
Kernel amoroso amoroso
Components 5 5
GPD tail TRUE TRUE
Epsilon 0.025 0.025
Outcome PS included: TRUE n (control) = 232 | n (treated) = 268 ``` ::: ::: ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} fit_sb_crp <- run_mcmc_causal(bundle_sb_crp) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Defining model ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Building model ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Setting data and initial values ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Checking model sizes and dimensions ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` [Note] This model is not fully initialized. This is not an error. To see which variables are not initialized, use model$initializeInfo(). For more information on model initialization, see help(modelInitialization). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Checking model calculations ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: beta ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (5) - beta[] (5 elements) ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Compiling [Note] This may take a minute. [Note] Use 'showCompilerOutput = TRUE' to see C++ compilation details. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Compiling [Note] This may take a minute. If you make changes to the nimbleFunctions for the distribution, you must call 'deregisterDistributions' before using the distribution in BUGS code for those changes to take effect. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Building model ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Setting data and initial values ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` [Note] 'ps' is provided in 'data' but is not a variable in the model and is being ignored. ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Checking model sizes and dimensions ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` [Note] This model is not fully initialized. For more information on model initialization, see help(modelInitialization). ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` Checking model calculations ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` ===== Monitors ===== thin = 1: alpha, beta_tail_scale, loc, scale, shape1, shape2, tail_shape, threshold, z ===== Samplers ===== RW sampler (6) - threshold - beta_tail_scale[] (4 elements) - tail_shape CRP_concentration sampler (1) - alpha CRP_cluster_wrapper sampler (20) - loc[] (5 elements) - scale[] (5 elements) - shape1[] (5 elements) - shape2[] (5 elements) CRP sampler (1) - z[1:232] ``` ::: ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stderr} ``` [Warning] sampler_CRP: The number of clusters based on the cluster parameters is less than the number of potential clusters. interval = "credible") safe_plot(qte_sb_crp) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](ex19-causal-different-backends-SB_files/figure-html/qte-sb-crp-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: {.cell-output-display} build_causal_bundle( y = y, T = T, X = X, kernel = c("amoroso", "amoroso"), backend = c("crp", "sb"), PS = "logit", GPD = c(TRUE, TRUE), components = c(5, 5), param_specs = param_specs_gpd, mcmc_outcome = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 2), mcmc_ps = list(niter = 2500, nburnin = 500, nchains = 1, thin = 1, seed = 2) ) bundle_crp_sb ``` ::: {.cell-output
